name: Circus Baby

possessedBy.source: Sister Location (Baby's ice cream story and cutscenes); reinforced by Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator

status.value: Ejected from Ennard; continues as Scrap Baby
status.source: Sister Location Custom Night cutscenes and Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator

notes: Star of Circus Baby's Entertainment and Rental, built by William Afton with child-capture capabilities; killed his daughter Elizabeth.
Merged with the other Funtimes to form Ennard, later ejected by the group.

name: Scrap Baby

possessedBy.source: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator (Henry's final speech addresses her directly)

status.source: Burned in the Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator fire

notes: Circus Baby's self-rebuilt body after being ejected from Ennard.

name: Ballora

status.source: Sister Location (scooped on Night 4; part of Ennard by the ending)

notes: Ballerina animatronic from the Ballora Gallery; keeps her eyes closed and hunts by sound.
The popular theory that she is tied to Mrs. Afton has no canonical support; intentionally omitted from possessedBy.

name: Minireena
notes: Ballora's small dancer companions; modeled as a single entry representing the group.
Classifying Minireenas as Ballora variants is an editorial decision — they are distinct entities in-universe.

name: Bidybab
notes: Circus Baby's small assistants; modeled as a single entry representing the group.
Classifying Bidybabs as Circus Baby variants is an editorial decision — they are distinct entities in-universe.

name: Electrobab
notes: Power-draining Bidybab variant introduced in Sister Location's Custom Night.

name: PlushBaby
notes: Circus Baby plush that attacks in Help Wanted's Dark Rooms; also appears in Halloween recolors within Curse of Dreadbear — verify before adding the DLC id.

name: Ennard
color: Exposed wires with a clown mask

possessedBy.value: Amalgam of the Funtime animatronics (initially led by Circus Baby)
possessedBy.source: Sister Location (formed from the scooped Funtimes to escape inside Michael Afton's body)

status.value: Continues as Molten Freddy after ejecting Circus Baby
status.source: Sister Location Custom Night cutscenes and Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator

notes: Not a design variant of any single character: a fusion of Circus Baby, Ballora, Funtime Freddy and Funtime Foxy's endoskeletons.
After Circus Baby's ejection, the remaining amalgam is cataloged as molten-freddy.
Appears in Ultimate Custom Night through vent attacks alongside the Sister Location cast — verify the exact roster form (Ennard vs Molten Freddy) on the wiki.

name: Yenndo
notes: Funtime endoskeleton resembling Funtime Freddy's frame; rare encounter in the Funtime Auditorium and Sister Location's Custom Night.
Verify whether his Help Wanted cameo warrants adding fnaf-hw.

name: Baby (Novel Trilogy)
notes: The Fourth Closet's main animatronic antagonist, running the sinister Circus Baby's Pizza; a far more monstrous take on the games' Circus Baby.
